description_long: This nightstand features a minimalist, boxy design with clean, straight lines and a light wood grain finish. The front face displays a single, wide drawer above an open shelf compartment, both seamlessly integrated without visible handles. The sides and top are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the modern aesthetic and the natural wood texture. The base of the nightstand sits flush with the ground, lacking any visible legs or feet, which gives it a solid, grounded appearance. There are no decorative elements or hardware, contributing to its understated, functional look. The open shelf provides additional storage or display space beneath the drawer.
description: A minimalist, light wood nightstand with a single drawer and an open shelf, featuring clean lines and a modern, handleless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide drawer above an open shelf, both seamlessly integrated with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, unadorned wood grain surface and the boxy, legless structure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without the drawer or shelf opening, showing a continuous wood panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with a flat, uninterrupted wood grain surface.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
